title: Storage Classes — AWS EFS
text:
To configure AWS EFS storage, you can use the out-of-tree
AWS_EFS_CSI_DRIVER
.
kind
:
StorageClass
apiVersion
:
storage.k8s.io/v1
metadata
:
name
:
efs-sc
provisioner
:
efs.csi.aws.com
parameters
:
provisioningMode
:
efs-ap
fileSystemId
:
fs-92107410
directoryPerms
:
"700"
provisioningMode
: The type of volume to be provisioned by Amazon EFS. Currently, only access point based provisioning is supported (
efs-ap
).
fileSystemId
: The file system under which the access point is created.
directoryPerms
: The directory permissions of the root directory created by the access point.
For more details, refer to the
AWS_EFS_CSI_Driver Dynamic Provisioning
documentation.
